# Code of Conduct

## Standard

Tamazia operates by the Contributor Covenant v2.1. The goal is a working environment where contributors deliver good work without harassment, discrimination, or hostility.

## Reporting

Conduct concerns go to founder@tamazia.co.uk. We respond within 48 hours.

## Enforcement

Confirmed violations result in a written warning on first occurrence, immediate access revocation on second, and irreversible removal from the contributor pool on third.
